title: Unable to install podman because of broken dependency
body:
It is currently not possible to install podman on CentOS 8 because of broken dependencies.

Of you try to install podman you will end up with

```
Error:
 Problem: cannot install the best candidate for the job
  - nothing provides conmon >= 2:2.0.16-3 needed by podman-1.9.3-2.1.el8.x86_64
```

However in the repository itself is only `2:2.0.16-1.1.el8` of `conmon` available.

I did not check other CentOS versions for this problem. Might be also affacted.

comments.body: @lsm5 PTAL. @cranebytes used the Kubic stable repo.
This was caused due to `Release: <CI_CNT>.<B_CNT>` in the OBS project config. I'll check on how best to fix this..
Closing. Please reopen if the issue persists.
